chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No. S- 605 of 2022 Mst. Safia and another ------------------- Petitioners VERSUS Province of Sindh & others ----------------- Respondents Dates of hearing: 15.08.2022 Date of decision: 15.08.2022 None present for petitioners. Mr. Rafiq Ahmed Dahri, Asstt: A.G. O R D E R ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON, J-. Through instant petition, the petitioners have sought direction to official respondents to restrain private respondents from harassing the petitioners and further to provide them legal protection. Perusal of memo of petition shows that the petitioners contracted free will marriage which caused annoyance to private respondents and the official respondents at their instance are causing harassment to them, hence they have filed the instant petition. Contracting marriage is a right of every adult male and female and the official respondents are duty bound to provide legal protection to every citizen being their vested right; therefore, if the petitioners approaches them they will be provided protection as per law. In view of the above, the instant petition is disposed of with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law, shall not cause any harassment to petitioners and shall provide legal protection to them. JUDGE Karar_hussain/PS*
